data.description:
## Story A: Define `commands.test_runner` and `commands.test_file_runner` config keys (Foundation / walking skeleton)

### Description
**What**: Introduce `commands.test_runner` (required) and `commands.test_file_runner` (optional) config keys in `dso-config.conf`, with documented semantics and examples for pytest, RSpec, Jest, and make-target forms. Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md. Define the `{file}` placeholder convention for the per-file key.
**Why**: Every downstream story (onboarding auto-detect, test-gate recording script updates, per-file gate, reinstall-hooks unblock) consumes these keys. Defining them first establishes the contract.
**Scope**:
- IN: config key schema, default-value semantics, placeholder substitution rules, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md updates, `read-config.sh` compatibility verification
- OUT: onboarding-side auto-detection (Story B), gate-script reads (Stories C/D), per-file gate substitution logic (Story E)

### Done Definitions
- When this story is complete, `commands.test_runner` and `commands.test_file_runner` are documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md with per-stack examples and the `{file}` placeholder convention
  ← Satisfies: "commands.test_runner config key defined and documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md" + "commands.test_file_runner ... defined and documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md"
- When this story is complete, a host project can set `commands.test_runner=pytest tests/` in `dso-config.conf` and `read-config.sh commands.test_runner` returns the value
  ← Satisfies: "commands.test_runner config key defined and documented"

### Considerations
- [Maintainability] This SC pattern (commands.X keys) is the foundation reused by 3818-310d (commands.lint / commands.format / commands.format_check); match the existing conventions
- [Testing] Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
## Escalation Policy
**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a DSO maintainer, commands.test_runner and commands.test_file_runner config keys are defined so the test gate can be stack-agnostic
